title: Get Inside Fisher’s head!
text: GET INSIDE FISHER’S HEAD! I can’t explain to you what it means to me that you’ve followed Saeris and Kingfisher’s journey this far. I hope you’ve enjoyed the adventure and the romance between our characters over the past 622 pages, and I hope you’re excited for more. Book 2 in the Fae and Alchemy series will be released in October 2024. A pre-order will be coming for the next installment very soon. In the meantime, I am preparing something very special for you! Please make sure to visit my website at www.calliehart.com and stop by the Quicksilver page. I will be uploading brand new exclusive chapters there toward the end of June, told from Kingfisher’s point of view. The best way to be notified that the chapters are live is to make sure you sign up for my newsletter right here. That way, the chapters will be delivered directly to your inbox when they go live! SIGN UP FOR CALLIE’S NEWSLETTER HERE
